title: Phase 2: Library-Specific Declaration Headers

baseline.notes: Build has const qualifier warnings and one implicit function declaration warning (g_settings_backend_writable_changed)

stages.title: Rename Header File Generation
stages.description: Modify the header generation to use library-specific naming pattern `<ns>_decls.h` instead of generic `generated_forward_decls.h`. This is the foundation for cross-namespace header inclusion.

changes: Change header guard naming from `_%s_generated_forward_decls_` to `_%s_decls_h_`
Change function name from `generate_forward_decls_header` to `generate_decls_header`
Remove `~external_enums` and `~external_bitfields` parameters
Add `~cross_references` parameter to determine dependencies
Update header file comment generation to reflect new naming
Update header file path generation to use `<ns>_decls.h` pattern (lines 727-730)
Pass `ctx.cross_references` instead of `external_enums`/`external_bitfields` to header generation (lines 733-738)
Add helper function `get_dependency_namespaces` to extract dependency namespaces from cross_references map

new_tests.description: Test that header file is named `<ns>_decls.h` for each namespace
Test that header guard uses `_<ns>_decls_h_` format

stages.title: Remove External Enum Forward Declarations
stages.description: Remove the deprecated external enum forward declaration generation from `c_stub_enum.ml`. External enum declarations will now come from included headers.

changes: Remove `~external_enums` parameter from `generate_forward_decls` function signature (line 13)
Delete lines 30-38 (the block that generates external namespace enum forward declarations)
Remove `emit_enum_proto` function if only used for external enums (verify usage first)
Update function documentation to reflect removal of external enum support
Update call to `C_stub_enum.generate_forward_decls` to not pass `~external_enums` parameter (lines 62-63)
Remove external enum filtering logic from the function
Remove `~external_enums` parameter from `generate_c_file_header` function (line 48)
Remove unused external_enums handling at line 50

new_tests.description: Test that generated header does NOT contain forward declarations for external enums

stages.title: Remove External Bitfield Forward Declarations
stages.description: Remove the deprecated external bitfield forward declaration generation from `c_stub_bitfield.ml`. External bitfield declarations will now come from included headers.

changes: Remove `~external_bitfields` parameter from `generate_forward_decls` function signature (line 29)
Delete lines 60-68 (the block that generates external namespace bitfield forward declarations)
Update function documentation to reflect removal of external bitfield support
Update call to `C_stub_bitfield.generate_forward_decls` to not pass `~external_bitfields` parameter (lines 67-70)
Remove external bitfield filtering logic from the function
Remove `~external_bitfields` parameter from `generate_c_file_header` function (line 48)
Remove unused external_bitfields handling

new_tests.description: Test that generated header does NOT contain forward declarations for external bitfields

stages.title: Generate Dependency Header Includes
stages.description: Add `#include` directives for each dependency namespace's header file in the generated `<ns>_decls.h`. This allows dependent libraries to access type converters from their dependencies.

changes: Add helper function to extract dependency namespaces from `cross_references` map (after line 26)
Add `#include` generation logic at the TOP of the header file, after the main library header include (after line 37)
Filter out 'GLib', 'GModule', 'GObject' from dependency list
Generate `#include "<ns_lower>_decls.h"` for each dependency namespace
Example output for gtk_decls.h: `#include "gdk_decls.h"`, `#include "gio_decls.h"`
Ensure cross_references map is passed to header generation function (already done in Stage 1, verify)

new_tests.description: Test that gtk_decls.h includes gdk_decls.h and gio_decls.h when those are dependencies
Test that GLib, GModule, GObject are NOT included as dependencies

stages.title: Update C Stub File Header Include
stages.description: Update the C stub file generation to include the library-specific header instead of the generic `generated_forward_decls.h`.

changes: Modify `generate_c_file_header` function to accept namespace parameter or derive it from ctx
Change line 78 from `#include "generated_forward_decls.h"` to `#include "<ns>_decls.h"`
The namespace should be derived from `ctx.namespace.namespace_name`

new_tests.description: Test that generated C stub files include the correct `<ns>_decls.h` header

stages.title: SKIPPED: Update Dune File Generation - Include Paths
stages.description: SKIPPED: This stage was originally planned to add `-I../../<dep>/generated` flags, but this is not needed. The <library>_decls.h headers are made available through the proper library dependency mechanism. No code changes were made for this stage.

stages.title: Update Dune File Generation - Library Dependencies
stages.description: Modify dune file generation to add `ocgtk.<dep>` entries in the `(libraries ...)` clause for OCaml-level dependencies. We depend on the public library (not ocgtk.<dep>.generated stubs) to access the <ns>_decls.h header through the proper interface.

changes: Update the `(libraries ...)` clause (line 67) to include dependency libraries
Add `ocgtk.<dep>.generated` for each dependency namespace (excluding GLib, GModule, GObject)
Use the `library_name_of_namespace` helper from Stage 6
Example: generating for GSK should include `ocgtk.gio.generated` and `ocgtk.gdk.generated`
Ensure dependencies are listed in correct order (dependencies before dependents)

new_tests.description: Test that dune file includes `ocgtk.gdk.generated` in libraries clause when GDK is a dependency
Test that library dependencies are listed in correct dependency order

stages.title: Integration Testing - Multi-Library Header Compilation
stages.description: Create integration tests that verify the complete cross-namespace header system works correctly when multiple libraries are generated.

changes: Create test that generates Gdk bindings first, then Gtk bindings
Verify gtk_decls.h correctly includes gdk_decls.h
Verify C compilation succeeds with cross-namespace type usage
Test real scenario: Gtk method using Gdk.Texture parameter

new_tests.description: End-to-end test: Generate Gdk and Gtk, verify headers compile together
Test that C code using cross-namespace types compiles successfully

stages.title: Cleanup and Documentation
stages.description: Clean up any remaining references to old naming, update documentation, and add deprecation notices where appropriate.

changes: Add deprecation comment noting that external enum forward declarations are no longer generated
Reference Phase 2 plan document for context
Add deprecation comment noting that external bitfield forward declarations are no longer generated
Reference Phase 2 plan document for context
Update Phase 2 section to mark completed items
Add notes about implementation details discovered during work

existing_tests_must_pass: All test suites - this is a verification stage

risks.risk: Build breaks due to missing includes
risks.mitigation: Stage 8 integration tests will catch this before finalization
GTK dependency chain is acyclic (GIO→GDK→GSK→GTK), verify in Stage 4

risks.risk: Dune include paths incorrect for different directory layouts
risks.mitigation: Test with actual project structure in Stage 6-7

risks.risk: Removing external enum/bitfield declarations breaks existing code
risks.mitigation: Stage 2 and 3 include comprehensive tests to verify no regression

open_questions: Should we keep backward compatibility with `generated_forward_decls.h` as a symlink during transition period?
How should we handle version mismatches between generated headers from different library versions?
Should dependency namespaces be sorted alphabetically in includes or follow dependency order?
Do we need to generate empty `<ns>_decls.h` files for libraries with no types (edge case)?

coding_guidelines_compliance.nesting_max_2_levels: All new functions must follow max 2-level nesting rule
coding_guidelines_compliance.bind_operators: Use let* and let+ operators for Result/Option chains in new code
coding_guidelines_compliance.error_handling: Use Result types for operations that can fail (e.g., dependency extraction)
coding_guidelines_compliance.ast_validation: All new tests must use AST-based validation per test-patterns.md
coding_guidelines_compliance.test_assertions: Tests must use Alcotest.fail for failures, not Option matching

phase_2_requirements_checklist.requirement: Remove external enum forward declarations (use header inclusion instead)
Remove external bitfield forward declarations (use header inclusion instead)
Update dune files to include `ocgtk.<dep>` in libraries clause (public library, not .generated stubs)
